legacy.content:
# Phase 32 Context: Next Parity or Polish
## Purpose
Placeholder for next development priority. Depends on Phase 29 (engine/KAPLAY parity) and Phase 31 (canonical identifiers) completion.
## Candidate Focus Areas
- Phase 29 completion: Rune Forge purchase/re-equip, combat-state UI, dialogue progression - Phase 31 follow-on: uiIntent/uiScreen constants if needed - Reporting: playthrough analyzer, report viewer UX - Content pack diff / versioning tooling
## Next Action
After 31-01 and 31-02: reassess STATE.md and ROADMAP; pick 32 focus.
